name: crosschain-trusted-transport-prototype
description: Minimal prototype for trusted cross-chain data transport experiments

scripts.proof:build: node -e "throw new Error('legacy proof-builder removed; use hxmsg-builder')"
scripts.proof:build:evm: node -e "throw new Error('EVM MELV-EF builder is scheduled for stage 4')"
scripts.fabric:test:ack: node -e "throw new Error('ACK will be reintroduced as h-xmsg RESPONSE/ACK after stage 3')"
scripts.fabric:cc:deploy: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml run --rm fabric-tools bash /fabric-network/fabric-network/scripts/deploy-chaincode.sh
scripts.fabric:cc:invoke: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml run --rm fabric-tools bash /fabric-network/fabric-network/scripts/invoke-xcall.sh
scripts.fabric:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml up -d fabric-ca.org1.example.com orderer.example.com peer0.org1.example.com peer1.org1.example.com peer2.org1.example.com peer3.org1.example.com validator-node-1 validator-node-2 validator-node-3 validator-node-4 consensus-aggregator
scripts.evm:up: docker compose up -d evm-node evm-validator-node-1 evm-validator-node-2 evm-validator-node-3 evm-validator-node-4
scripts.fabric:channel: docker compose -f docker-compose.fabric.yml run --rm fabric-tools bash /fabric-network/fabric-network/scripts/create-channel.sh
scripts.exp:tamper: node -e "throw new Error('h-xmsg security suite not implemented in stage 3')"
scripts.exp:replay: node -e "throw new Error('h-xmsg security suite not implemented in stage 3')"
scripts.exp:forged: node -e "throw new Error('h-xmsg security suite not implemented in stage 3')"
scripts.exp:rollback: node -e "throw new Error('h-xmsg security suite not implemented in stage 3')"
scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Use Ubuntu flow: npm run deploy && npm run hxmsg:test:forward after Fabric/EVM/TEE are up')"
